description: Protects premium learning media from unauthorized redistribution while preserving authorized learner playback.
functional_scope: DRM license issuance tied to tenant/user/session
signed playback tokens with short TTL and device constraints
real_world_constraints: Must tolerate unstable mobile networks by supporting segment retries without revealing decryption keys.
Must reduce screen-capture and account-sharing piracy risk using watermark + concurrent-session enforcement.
Must fail closed for non-entitled requests and expired licenses.

required.reason: Owns transcoded assets, manifests, key identifiers, and delivery URLs.
Authoritative check that user/tenant can access protected media.

optional.reason: Raises risk score for rooted/jailbroken or high-fraud devices.

description: Enables learning continuity with unreliable internet through secure download, local playback, and resumable sync.
functional_scope: download queue with pause/resume and integrity checks
selective sync of only entitled courses/assets
resume playback/reading from last local checkpoint
adaptive low-bandwidth profiles for constrained networks
real_world_constraints: Must work in poor-connectivity regions with intermittent packet loss and long offline windows.
Downloaded media must remain encrypted at rest and expire when entitlement or offline lease ends.
Sync conflicts must resolve deterministically (idempotent event merge by attempt/session timestamp).

required.reason: Provides downloadable renditions and integrity metadata.
Validates offline download rights and lease duration.

optional.reason: Prompts learner when sync is pending or lease nearing expiry.
